channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Mewgenics’ Steam Scores Are Sky-High, And It Instantly Was Profitable
item.description: Mewgenics is on pace to the most successful indie game of the year, making back its budget almost instantly and attracting rave Steam reviews.

item.title: Microsoft Confirms Windows Is Under Attack — Update Now
item.description: Attackers have not waited for Exploit Wednesday; the Microsoft Windows zero-day attacks have already started. Here’s what you need to know and do.

item.title: NetSuite Unveils AI Tools to Streamline Financial Processes and Boost Efficiency

item.title: Netflix’s Best New Movie Has A Record 97% Rotten Tomatoes Audience Score
item.description: Netflix has a new #1 movie on its Top 10 list, one that set a Rotten Tomatoes audience score record when it was originally in theaters.

item.title: What Are Client Loyalty Cards and How Do They Function?

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Thursday, February 12
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Predictive AI Thrives, Despite GenAI Stealing The Spotlight
item.description: GenAI and predictive AI battle for resources, but even as the overwhelming attention focuses on genAI, enterprises are still adopting predictive AI ju...

item.title: Process thinking

item.title: Free agency
